---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Mobile-WP
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
**What problem are you trying to solve?**
A clear description of the problem. E.g., "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution
**What would you like to happen?**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
**What alternatives have you considered?**
A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
**Who would benefit from this feature?**
Describe the type of user (new user, power user, agency, etc.) and how often they'd use it.

## Mockups / Examples
If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or links to similar features in other products.

## Implementation Notes
Any technical details or considerations for implementing this feature.

## Would you be willing to contribute this feature?
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, but I'd love to see it built
